overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a historical action game (Assassin's Creed Mirage) showing a hooded protagonist walking through a medieval Middle Eastern city at dusk. The character moves through narrow streets, covered markets, and stone archways while warm lamplight contrasts against the deep blue twilight sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street leading to open plaza with historic architecture

events.description: passing a stationary horse-drawn cart parked on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow street lined with palm trees, approaching a plaza with an ornate sandstone building

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn cart parked stationary on the left side of the path
pedestrian in white robes walking in the same direction

entered.detail: tall palm tree with visible trunk and fronds against the blue sky
historic sandstone building with arched doorways and warm lantern light
tan fabric canopy stretched between buildings providing shade
wooden cart with large wheels parked along the street
large historic building with intricate stone archway and decorative patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow street lined with sandstone buildings and palm trees. The protagonist walks forward, passing a stationary horse cart on the left while approaching an ornate building with a decorative archway in the distance. Warm lantern light glows from doorways against the blue twilight sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market bazaar with blue fabric canopies

events.description: passing a central stone fountain in the market square

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered market area with blue fabric canopies overhead, navigating between stalls

notable_agents.action: market vendor standing beside a pottery stall

entered.detail: large blue fabric canopy stretched overhead providing shade to the market street
wooden market stall displaying large clay pots and urns
stone water fountain with basin in the center of the market square
patterned stone tile flooring covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bustling market area covered by large blue fabric canopies. The stone-paved street features market stalls selling pottery and goods. A central fountain appears as the character moves deeper into the market, with warm light filtering through the blue fabric overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone archway passage between buildings

events.description: entering a darker stone archway passage with reduced natural light
passing guards in red and white uniforms standing watch along the path

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow stone archway passage, moving from the covered market into a darker alley

notable_agents.action: guard in red and white uniform standing watch near the wall

entered.detail: large stone archway forming a tunnel-like passage between buildings
green ivy climbing up the sandstone wall on the right
tall narrow evergreen tree visible beyond the archway

segments.scene_description: Leaving the market, the character enters a narrow stone archway that creates a darker, enclosed passage. Ivy vines cover the walls, and the lighting shifts to low light. Guards in distinctive red uniforms stand watch as the character passes through the tunnel-like space.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with yellow fabric awnings and merchant stalls

agents.ego_description: walking along a wider street lined with market stalls and yellow fabric awnings, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green robes walking alongside the protagonist

entered.detail: yellow and orange fabric awnings stretched across the street overhead
market stall with woven baskets and goods displayed
large fortified stone gate with archway visible in the distance
tall stone tower with crenellations visible above the buildings

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow passage, the scene opens into a medium-width market street shaded by yellow fabric awnings. Various stalls line the path, and a large stone gate becomes visible in the distance. The crowd density increases as the character moves toward the fortified entrance.

events.description: Eagle Vision activates, highlighting nearby NPCs with white detection outlines

agents.ego_description: approaching a large stone gate while Eagle Vision highlights nearby NPCs in white outlines, indicating a stealth detection mode

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs highlighted with white Eagle Vision detection outlines

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching a large fortified stone gate. The Eagle Vision gameplay mechanic activates, surrounding nearby NPCs with glowing white outlines. The market awnings fall behind as the character moves into a more open area before the city gate.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval city at dusk, transitioning from quiet sandstone streets into bustling markets and through a fortified gate. It begins on a narrow road lined with palm trees and glowing lanterns, moving past a stationary horse cart toward an ornate archway. As the character advances, the scene opens into a vibrant market covered by blue fabric canopies and centered around a stone fountain, before shifting into a darker, ivy-covered stone passage guarded by soldiers in red uniforms. The environment then expands again into a crowded street shaded by yellow awnings that lead toward a massive fortified entrance. Finally, the camera approaches the large stone gate as the Eagle Vision mechanic activates, highlighting nearby NPCs in glowing white outlines against the open city square.
